infoBox.title: How does it work?
infoBox.description: Your Garant automatically receives a notification if you haven't confirmed your task completion within the allotted time.

actions.deleteConfirmMessage: {{name}} will no longer receive any alerts from you.

app.title: Garant with the ACTIO app
app.desc: They receive an invitation and install the app to track you

direct.title: Garant without the app
direct.desc: They get the alert by SMS, Email or WhatsApp, no install needed

invite.note: Your garant will receive an email with a link to accept the invitation and download the app.

delay.label: DELAY BEFORE ALERT
delay.lockedNote: Only available at {{minutes}} min on the free plan. Upgrade to Pro to customize this delay.

preview.label: MESSAGE PREVIEW
preview.message: "Hey {{name}}, [Your name] hasn't completed their scheduled ACTIO safety check {{delay}} ago. Please check if everything is okay."

add.privacy: Your Garant only sees the title of your task.

validation.contactRequired: Enter a phone number or email so this Garant can actually be alerted

edit.modeLocked: The alert mode can't be changed after creation
edit.emailLocked: Email can't be edited — it's tied to the invitation sent.
